title: God Sparing In Scourging.
content:
God still rewards us more than our desert;
    But when He strikes, He quarter-acts His part.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "God Sparing In Scourging."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
